name: Origin Story Timeline
description: A vertical historical timeline documenting the origin story. Features a sequence of year markers, headings, and body text, visually connected by a dotted line.

field_schema.label: Eyebrow
field_schema.help: A small, uppercase label displayed above the main heading.

field_schema.label: Heading
field_schema.help: The primary title of the section.

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.help: The main descriptive text for this section.

sub_fields.label: Accent color
sub_fields.help: Choose the theme color for this element.

entries.body: Linh quits her bank job. Starts leading food tours for backpacker friends.
Tuan joins after driving Linh through Ha Giang on a whim. The loop is born.
Pandemic hits. We pivot to online cooking classes and stay connected.
We open a Hanoi office. Still just a room above a bánh mì shop.
2,400+ travelers later, we're still on plastic stools.
